overall.description: Underwater exploration sequence from a video game (Horizon Forbidden West) showing a character in diving gear swimming through a submerged canyon system. The character navigates narrow rocky passages, kelp forests, and open water areas with ancient ruins visible in the distance, all lit by filtered sunlight from the surface creating a cinematic blue-teal atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow underwater canyon passage with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: swimming steadily through the narrow canyon passage between steep rock walls

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the underwater canyon
steep dark rock wall forming the right boundary of the underwater canyon
bright blue light filtering down from the water surface above

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a diver swimming through a narrow underwater canyon. Steep rock walls flank both sides while blue light filters down from the surface above, creating a serene submerged environment with limited visibility into the distance.

events.description: tall kelp forest becomes visible on the left side of the passage

agents.ego_description: swimming forward through the kelp forest area, navigating between the tall aquatic plants on the left

entered.detail: dense forest of tall vertical kelp stalks rising from the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The diver continues through the canyon as the left wall recedes into the distance and a dense kelp forest emerges on the left side. The tall aquatic vegetation sways in the current while the right canyon wall remains prominent, creating a corridor-like passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open underwater area with ancient ruins

events.description: exits the narrow kelp corridor into open water with ancient ruins visible ahead
large rectangular underwater structure appears on the right side

agents.ego_description: swimming through open water toward distant ruins, passing a large rock formation on the right

entered.detail: ancient stone structures visible in the distance through the blue water
massive blocky rock structure or building remnant on the right side

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up significantly as the diver leaves the kelp forest behind. Ancient ruins become visible in the distant blue haze ahead, while a large rock formation or structural remnant dominates the right side of the frame. The water feels more expansive with light penetrating from the surface above.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow underwater cave with overhead rock arches

events.description: character begins swimming slightly upward toward the surface exit
swimming under overhead rock archway near the water surface

agents.ego_description: swimming upward through the shallow passage toward the surface, navigating under rock overhangs and arches

entered.detail: rocky overhang and arch formations visible above near the water surface
sandy seabed with scattered rocks and coral visible below
green aquatic plants and coral growing on the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The diver ascends through a shallower section of the canyon where rock arches and overhangs are visible near the rippling surface above. The bottom becomes sandy with scattered vegetation, and the light from the surface grows brighter as the character swims toward the exit of the underwater passage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow underwater canyon that gradually opens into a lush aquatic forest. It begins by trailing a diver swimming between steep, flanking rock walls under a canopy of filtered blue light. As the diver progresses, the restrictive canyon walls begin to recede on the left, allowing the environment to expand. The scene then shifts as a dense forest of tall kelp emerges from the depths, with the vegetation swaying in the current to create a natural corridor alongside the remaining rocky cliff.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dense underwater forest into a bright, shallow canyon exit. It begins as the diver leaves a kelp forest behind, moving into an expansive blue haze where ancient ruins emerge in the distance and a massive structural remnant looms to the right. As the diver continues forward, the environment shifts toward a shallower section of the canyon, bringing rock arches and overhangs into view beneath a rippling surface. The scene then opens further as the seabed turns to sandy terrain with scattered vegetation, while the filtered light grows increasingly bright. Finally, the camera ascends toward the surface, gliding through the narrowing passage toward the open water beyond.
